CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-07-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Ron Sinclair. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/7/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by La Von Granger. (212)
